name: should generate a tackle assist columns query
description: Test case for should generate a tackle assist columns query
expected_query: with "tf11890ff3026bb6310b96dd6deeafa55" as materialized (select pid, SUM(CASE WHEN pid_column = 'solo_tackle_1_pid' THEN 1 WHEN pid_column = 'solo_tackle_2_pid' THEN 1 WHEN pid_column = 'solo_tackle_3_pid' THEN 1 WHEN pid_column = 'assisted_tackle_1_pid' THEN 1 WHEN pid_column = 'assisted_tackle_2_pid' THEN 1 WHEN pid_column = 'tackle_assist_1_pid' THEN 1 WHEN pid_column = 'tackle_assist_2_pid' THEN 1 WHEN pid_column = 'tackle_assist_3_pid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS combined_tackles_from_plays from (select assisted_tackle_1_pid as pid, 'assisted_tackle_1_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year from "nfl_plays" where "assisted_tackle_1_pid" is not null and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) union all select assisted_tackle_2_pid as pid, 'assisted_tackle_2_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year from "nfl_plays" where "assisted_tackle_2_pid" is not null and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) union all select solo_tackle_1_pid as pid, 'solo_tackle_1_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year from "nfl_plays" where "solo_tackle_1_pid" is not null and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) union all select solo_tackle_2_pid as pid, 'solo_tackle_2_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year from "nfl_plays" where "solo_tackle_2_pid" is not null and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) union all select solo_tackle_3_pid as pid, 'solo_tackle_3_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year from "nfl_plays" where "solo_tackle_3_pid" is not null and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) union all select tackle_assist_1_pid as pid, 'tackle_assist_1_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year from "nfl_plays" where "tackle_assist_1_pid" is not null and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) union all select tackle_assist_2_pid as pid, 'tackle_assist_2_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year from "nfl_plays" where "tackle_assist_2_pid" is not null and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) union all select tackle_assist_3_pid as pid, 'tackle_assist_3_pid' as pid_column, play_type, seas_type, year from "nfl_plays" where "tackle_assist_3_pid" is not null and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023)) as "defensive_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "defensive_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_PRE_WEEK_1', '2023_PRE_WEEK_2', '2023_PRE_WEEK_3', '2023_PRE_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_5', '2023_REG_WEEK_6', '2023_REG_WEEK_7', '2023_REG_WEEK_8', '2023_REG_WEEK_9', '2023_REG_WEEK_10', '2023_REG_WEEK_11', '2023_REG_WEEK_12', '2023_REG_WEEK_13', '2023_REG_WEEK_14', '2023_REG_WEEK_15', '2023_REG_WEEK_16', '2023_REG_WEEK_17', '2023_REG_WEEK_18', '2023_POST_WEEK_1', '2023_POST_WEEK_2', '2023_POST_WEEK_3', '2023_POST_WEEK_4') and "defensive_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "pid") select "player"."pid", "tf11890ff3026bb6310b96dd6deeafa55"."combined_tackles_from_plays" AS "combined_tackles_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "tf11890ff3026bb6310b96dd6deeafa55" on "tf11890ff3026bb6310b96dd6deeafa55"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "tf11890ff3026bb6310b96dd6deeafa55"."combined_tackles_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
